Thanks @Copilot for the review. Addressed in 3500b9197: **Loader fix (HWSKU cross-platform collision)** The HWSKU shard layer was keyed solely by `` filename, so two `platforms/

/hwskus/.json` shards under different platform directories with the same filename silently overwrote each other based on directory-walk order. Fixed by nesting the merged tree as `hwskus..` and updating the resolver to look up by `(platform, hwsku)`. Added regression test `test_hwsku_same_name_under_different_platforms` exercising two platforms with the same HWSKU filename but different bodies (26/26 tests pass). **`firmware_overrides` slot (no producer yet)** Good catch — `DutInfoLoader` does not currently populate `active_firmware_version` in `BASE_ATTRIBUTES`, so the `firmware_overrides` resolver layer is silently inert today. This is by design: the slot is reserved in the schema so contributors do not invent ad-hoc keys for firmware-conditional overrides; the producer will land with the CDB FW upgrade test infrastructure. Added an inline comment in `_resolve_priority` documenting this so the next reader does not file the same question. **Stale wrapped-form examples in HLDs** All flagged JSON examples in `docs/testplan/transceiver/test_plan.md` (platform / HWSKU / vendor / per-PN) and `docs/testplan/transceiver/dom_test_plan.md` (4 per-PN) have been rewritten to the scope-rooted body form that matches the actual on-disk shard contract. Priority-hierarchy references to `hwskus.` updated to `hwskus.

.` for consistency with the new merge layout.

Supported commands
  • help:
    • Get descriptions, examples and documentation about supported commands
    • Example: help "command_name"
  • list:
    • List all pipelines for this repository using a comment.
    • Example: "list"
  • run:
    • Run all pipelines or specific pipelines for this repository using a comment. Use this command by itself to trigger all related pipelines, or specify specific pipelines to run.
    • Example: "run" or "run pipeline_name, pipeline_name, pipeline_name"
  • where:
    • Report back the Azure DevOps orgs that are related to this repository and org
    • Example: "where"

See additional documentation.

Hi @deerao02, the precommit check failed with the following linting errors:

```
ansible/library/generate_golden_config_db.py:157:78: E741 ambiguous variable name 'l'
ansible/library/generate_golden_config_db.py:746:17: F841 local variable 'ns' is assigned to but never used
ansible/library/port_alias.py:162:17: E116 unexpected indentation (comment)
ansible/library/port_alias.py:170:17: F841 local variable 'platform_dir' is assigned to but never used
ansible/library/port_alias.py:203:57: E127 continuation line over-indented for visual indent
ansible/library/port_alias.py:223:29: F841 local variable 'base_alias' is assigned to but never used
ansible/scripts/update_links_for_breakout.py:66:121: E501 line too long (125 > 120 characters)
ansible/scripts/update_links_for_breakout.py:131:5: F841 local variable 'total_with_mgmt' is assigned to but never used
ansible/scripts/update_links_for_breakout.py:132:11: F541 f-string is missing placeholders
ansible/scripts/update_links_for_breakout.py:139:22: E741 ambiguous variable name 'l'
ansible/scripts/update_links_for_breakout.py:141:9: E741 ambiguous variable name 'l'
ansible/scripts/update_links_for_breakout.py:144:9: E741 ambiguous variable name 'l'
```

Could you please fix these issues? Thank you!
